raw_consumer_statement: on XXXX I noticed 3 charges on my credit card from XXXX for {$980.00}, {$850.00}, {$920.00}. I immediately called and reported it as fraud. They did an investigation and 4 days sent me a letter saying I am responsible for the chargers. I ask to investigate again and again a couple days later said I was responsible. I did not make these charges. Barclays sent a letter not stating any prove just saying I am responsible. I filed a police report with the XXXX Police Department, and a report with the Federal trade Commission ( report # XXXX ).
